description: Visualize Marker Expression as violin plots and on a UMap. To be used after Seurat.Clustering
author: Edwin F. Juarez;UCSD - Mesirov Lab
plan:
## Seurat.VisualizeMarkerExpression GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Seurat.VisualizeMarkerExpression is a GenePattern module that Visualize Marker Expression as violin plots and on a UMap. To be used after Seurat.Clustering

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: input_file, genes, group_plots, output_file_name
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript --no-save --quiet --slave --no-restore  <libdir>seurat_visualize.R --input_file <input_file> --genes <genes> --group_plots <group_plots> --output_file_name <output_file_name>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/seurat-suite\:4.0.3

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: genes
parameters.description: List of genes to visualize. If you write multiple genes they must be separated by a comma and a space (for example\: MS4A1, CD8A, CD14).

parameters.name: group_plots
parameters.description: How to group plots that are associated with the same marker.

parameters.name: output_file_name
parameters.description: Basename of the file to be saved.
